member.name: M:GZCTF.Controllers.TeamController.InviteCodeRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
:\\d+:[0-9a-f]{32}
Explanation:
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a lowercase hexadecimal digit exactly 32 times.

member.name: M:GZCTF.Services.Transfer.GameImportService.CleanupUploadedFilesAsync(GZCTF.Services.Transfer.GameImportService.ImportContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clean up newly uploaded files in case of import failure
member.remarks: Only files in UploadedFiles (newly uploaded, not previously existing) are cleaned up. For files that already existed before import, database rollback will decrease their reference count automatically. Since database rollback removes the LocalFile records for newly uploaded files, we must manually delete the physical files.

member.name: M:GZCTF.Utils.Codec.FileHashRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 64 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:GZCTF.Utils.Codec.PasswordRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^(?=.*\\d)(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*[!@#$%^&*()\\-_=+]).{8,}$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Zero-width positive lookahead.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match a Unicode digit.
○ Zero-width positive lookahead.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [a-z].
○ Zero-width positive lookahead.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z].
○ Zero-width positive lookahead.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [!#-&(-+\-=@^_].
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily at least 8 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:GZCTF.Utils.Codec.ToBase(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert integers to target base strings

member.name: M:GZCTF.Utils.CodecExtensions.RFC1123ReplacePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[^a-zA-Z0-9]+
Explanation:
○ Match any character other than an ASCII letter or digit atomically at least once.

member.summary: Static challenge All teams use the same attachment and flag

member.summary: Static container challenge All teams use the same docker and flag

member.summary: Dynamic attachment challenge Randomly distribute attachments, implement flag specificity with attachments

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.NetworkMode.Open
member.remarks: Allows the container to access external networks, including the internet. Suitable for challenges that require external connectivity.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.NetworkMode.Isolated
member.remarks: Restricts the container from accessing any external networks. The container can only communicate within container internal network.

remarks.para:
For kubernetes provider
this mode will add a label to the pod: gzctf.gzti.me/NetworkMode: custom

For Docker provider
this mode will create the container in a user-defined docker network specified in the config.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.JoinGame
member.remarks: Division-level permission only. Controls whether users can join the game through this division. Without this permission, the division cannot accept new participants.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.RankOverall
member.summary: Can be ranked on the overall scoreboard
member.remarks: Division-level permission only. Determines if teams in this division appear on the overall scoreboard rankings. Teams without this permission will only have division-specific rankings. Use case: Unofficial participants or guest teams that should not compete for overall prizes.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.RequireReview
member.remarks: Division-level permission only. When enabled, participations require manual admin approval (Pending status). When disabled, participations are automatically accepted without review (Accepted status). Overrides game-level AcceptWithoutReview setting for this specific division. Use case: Require review for external registrations while auto-accepting internal teams. Note: Permission name is positive (require review) so that All permission defaults to the secure behavior.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.ViewChallenge
member.remarks: Challenge-specific permission. Controls access to challenge details, descriptions, and attachments. Without this permission, challenges will be hidden from the team.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.SubmitFlags
member.remarks: Challenge-specific permission. Allows teams to submit flag answers for challenges. Can be combined with ViewChallenge but without GetScore for practice/demo scenarios.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.GetScore
member.remarks: Challenge-specific permission. Determines if successful flag submissions award points to the team. Teams without this permission can submit flags but won't receive any score. Use case: Observer teams or late joiners who participate without competing.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.GetBlood
member.remarks: Challenge-specific permission. Allows teams to receive first/second/third blood bonus points. Requires GetScore permission to be effective. Blood bonuses are typically 30%, 20%, and 10% extra points. Use case: Restrict blood bonuses to specific divisions while allowing others to score normally.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.AffectDynamicScore
member.remarks: Challenge-specific permission. Controls whether this team's submissions count toward challenge accept count, which influences dynamic score calculation for all teams. Independent of GetScore - teams can score without affecting others' challenge values. Use case: Allow external participants to score without affecting internal competition's dynamic scoring.

member.name: F:GZCTF.Utils.GamePermission.All
member.remarks: Special value representing all current and future permissions. Use int.MaxValue to ensure compatibility with newly added permission flags.

{platform} @ {nowtime}

.
